title: Vendor in latest containers image
body:
We also want to add the containers/image/docs directory to the
vendor so that the skopeo rpm can pull the man pages for registries.conf
and policy.json directly from the repo.

Added new command to Makefile vendor-image, that will vendor in the latest
container/image, and maintain its docs directory.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@runcom @mtrmac I added changes to the README and a test which will fail if some one vendors in containers/image without using the special Makefile command.
PTAL

ACK.

I’m not _thrilled_ about treating c/image specially here, but it does work well enough.

Please drop `hack/vendor.sh` (it would be another place to update, and we don’t use it nor AFAICT need it for anything) and rebase.

@mtrmac Fixed the way you wanted.
@runcom PTAL
Shoot I just blew my patch away.
